basics.name: Alexandre Gauvain
basics.summary: Postdoctoral researcher in hydrology and hydrogeology working on groundwater modelling, climate-change impacts on water resources, and planetary hydrology for early Mars.

location.address: Sorbonne Université, Laboratoire de Météorologie Dynamique

work.name: Laboratoire de Météorologie Dynamique, CNRS / IPSL / Sorbonne Université
work.summary: Development of a global hydrological model for early Mars within the ERC Mars Through Time project.

work.name: Geosophy
work.summary: Groundwater-flow and heat-transport modelling for geothermal potential and feasibility studies.

work.name: Géosciences Rennes / OSUR
work.summary: Numerical modelling of coastal groundwater systems and contribution to the RIVAGES Normands 2100 project set-up.

education.area: PhD in Earth and Environmental Sciences

publications.name: A Global High-Resolution Hydrological Model to Simulate the Dynamics of Surface Liquid Reservoirs: Application on Mars
publications.summary: Submitted manuscript describing a km-scale hydrological model for dynamic surface-water reservoirs on early Mars.

publications.name: Technical Note: HydroModPy -- a Python toolbox for deploying catchment-scale shallow groundwater models
publications.publisher: Hydrology and Earth System Sciences, EGUsphere
publications.summary: Submitted technical note presenting HydroModPy as an open-source workflow for catchment-scale groundwater modelling.

publications.name: Characterizing Coastal Aquifer Heterogeneity from a Single Piezometer Head Chronicle
publications.summary: Journal article on diagnosing coastal aquifer heterogeneity from a single long piezometric record.

publications.name: Geomorphological Controls on Groundwater Transit Times: A Synthetic Analysis at the Hillslope Scale
publications.summary: Journal article linking landscape organisation and groundwater transit-time distributions.

presentations.name: Constraining Early Mars Climate Through Coupled Hydrological Modeling and Comparison with Geomorphological Evidence
presentations.description: Oral presentation on using hydrology and geomorphology together to test climate scenarios for early Mars.

presentations.name: A Global High-Resolution Hydrological Model: Conceptual Study of the Distribution of Surface Water Reservoirs on Early Mars
presentations.description: Presentation of a global high-resolution hydrological model for early Mars.

presentations.name: HydroModPy: a Python application for automating large-scale catchment model deployment
presentations.event: Réunion des sciences de la Terre 2023
presentations.description: Presentation of HydroModPy as an open-source workflow for catchment-scale modelling.

teaching.course: GIS practical sessions for Master's students in Water Sciences
teaching.description: Practical sessions in QGIS and ArcGIS focused on hydrological-risk mapping and spatial analysis.

teaching.course: Field supervision in hydrogeology and water sciences
teaching.description: Field campaigns in Normandy and Brittany linking measurements, site interpretation and hydrogeological reasoning.
Training for interns, PhD students and postdoctoral researchers using HydroModPy for catchment-scale modelling.
